audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass admits a maximum of two adult visitors at a reduced admission fee of $12 per person any day the museum is open. Children under age 16 are admitted free. Admission to special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.

coupon.source_phrase_block: Each pass admits a maximum of two adult visitors at a reduced admission fee of $12 per person any day the museum is open. Children under age 16 are admitted free. Admission to special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.
